revision.text:
{{Object | Name=Buzz Cola | Guid=3055-7776 | Deck=A popular cola drink in Springfield. | Characters=Characters/Bart_Simpson,Characters/Homer_Simpson,Characters/Krusty_the_Clown | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Fortnite,Games/LEGO_Dimensions,Games/The_Simpsons_Hit_And_Run,Games/The_Simpsons_Tapped_Out | Locations=Locations/BURD_E_Mart,Locations/California,Locations/Kwik_E_Mart,Locations/Los_Angeles,Locations/Oregon,Locations/Springfield,Locations/The_United_States_of_America | People= | Objects=Objects/Cola,Objects/Soft_Drink | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3819719-buzzz_jpg.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3819719-buzzz_jpg.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_super,square_small,square_mini,square_avatar,square_medium,scale_small,square_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> A popular cola drink in Springfield.

{{Object | Name=Cadillac Escalade | Guid=3055-7388 | Deck=Cadillac Escalade is a full-sized American luxury SUV that was produced by Cadillac and was become the popular SUV to be awarded for the best selling SUV for the decades. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Cadillac,Concepts/Licensed_Cars,Concepts/The_1990s,Concepts/The_2000s | Franchises= | Games=Games/Driver_San_Francisco,Games/Forza_Horizon,Games/Forza_Horizon_2,Games/Forza_Horizon_3,Games/Forza_Horizon_4,Games/Forza_Motorsport_6,Games/Midnight_Club_3_DUB_Edition,Games/Midnight_Club_Los_Angeles,Games/NBA_Ballers,Games/Need_for_Speed_Underground_2,Games/The_Crew_2,Games/The_Crew_Motorfest,Games/Top_Drives | Locations=Locations/The_United_States_of_America | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Sports_Utility_Vehicle | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3601729-img_2198.jpeg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3601729-img_2198.jpeg","path":"137\/1377390\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_tiny,square_medium,scale_super,scale_medium,scale_tiny,square_avatar,scale_small,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_large,screen_medium,scale_avatar","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Cadillac Escalade is a full-sized American luxury SUV that was produced by Cadillac and was become the popular SUV to be awarded for the best selling SUV for the decades.

{{Object | Name=Caffe Mocha | Guid=3055-7297 | Deck=Caffe Mocha, or sometimes referred to as macaccinos, are chocolate drinks, typically coffee-related. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Judgment,Games/Lost_Judgment,Games/Papas_Mocharia,Games/Risk_of_Rain_2 | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Chocolate,Objects/Coffee,Objects/Coffee_Beans,Objects/Coffee_Maker,Objects/Latte | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3507799-mocha-1fc71f7.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3507799-mocha-1fc71f7.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Caffe Mocha, or sometimes referred to as macaccinos, are chocolate drinks, typically coffee-related.

{{Object | Name=Canyonero | Guid=3055-7777 | Deck=The Canyonero is an unlockable vehicle in The Simpsons: Hit & Run. Like all other player owned cars this vehicle may be accessed via phone booths at any time, on any level. This is the first vehicle the player is forced to use during a mission. | Characters=Characters/Marge_Simpson | Concepts=Concepts/Unlockables | Franchises= | Games=Games/The_Simpsons_Hit_And_Run,Games/The_Simpsons_Road_Rage,Games/The_Simpsons_Tapped_Out | Locations=Locations/Springfield | People= | Objects=Objects/Sports_Utility_Vehicle | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3822340-7437936973-800px.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3822340-7437936973-800px.png","path":"151\/1511438\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,square_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_small,square_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Canyonero is an unlockable vehicle in The Simpsons: Hit & Run. Like all other player owned cars this vehicle may be accessed via phone booths at any time, on any level. This is the first vehicle the player is forced to use during a mission.

{{Object | Name=Cappuccino | Guid=3055-7294 | Deck=Cappuccinos are espresso-based coffee drinks that originated in Italy. | Characters= | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Judgment | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/California,Locations/Coffee_Time,Locations/Europe,Locations/Italy,Locations/Japan,Locations/Moonbucks_Coffee,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Thousand_Oaks,Locations/Tokyo,Locations/Ventura_County | People= | Objects=Objects/Coffee,Objects/Coffee_Beans,Objects/Coffee_Maker,Objects/Cup,Objects/Espresso,Objects/Milk,Objects/Sugar | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3504112-cappuccino_at_sightglass_coffee.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3504112-cappuccino_at_sightglass_coffee.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_avatar,scale_super,square_small,scale_medium,scale_small,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,scale_large,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Cappuccinos are espresso-based coffee drinks that originated in Italy.

{{Object | Name=Car Battery | Guid=3055-7664 | Aliases=Automotive Battery | Deck=Large rectangular/square rechargeable battery, sometimes called accumulator. Used for power in propulsion equipment: cars, warehouse forklifts, small elevators | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Battery_Backup,Concepts/Battery_Meter,Concepts/Electricity | Franchises= | Games=Games/Abiotic_Factor,Games/Call_of_Duty_Modern_Warfare_III,Games/DayZ,Games/Half_Life_2,Games/Hitman,Games/Hitman_2,Games/Hitman_3,Games/Project_Zomboid,Games/Resident_Evil,Games/Resident_Evil_0,Games/Resident_Evil_2002,Games/Resident_Evil_3_Nemesis,Games/Resident_Evil_7_biohazard,Games/Resident_Evil_Code_Veronica,Games/Resident_Evil_Origins_Collection,Games/Resident_Evil_Outbreak_File_2,Games/Resident_Evil_Revelations_2,Games/Shadow_Man,Games/The_Binding_of_Isaac_Rebirth,Games/The_Long_Dark | Locations=Locations/Garage | People= | Objects=Objects/Battery,Objects/Car,Objects/Duracell_Battery,Objects/Elevator,Objects/Energizer_Battery,Objects/Forklift | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3688364-residentevil3.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3688364-residentevil3.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"scale_medium,scale_small,scale_super,square_medium,square_avatar,square_small,square_tiny,scale_tiny,square_mini,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium,screen_kubrick","caption":"Resident Evil 3 (1999) "},"background":[]}' /> Large rectangular/square rechargeable battery, sometimes called accumulator. Used for power in propulsion equipment: cars, warehouse forklifts, small elevators

{{Object | Name=Chevrolet Camaro | Guid=3055-7440 | Deck=Chevrolet Camaro was the first pony muscle car the was manufactured in 1966 with an F-body to compete with the Ford Mustang. | Characters=Characters/Tobias_Jones | Concepts=Concepts/Chevrolet,Concepts/Licensed_Cars | Franchises= | Games=Games/Age_of_Empires,Games/Age_of_Empires_Definitive_Edition,Games/Chevrolet_Camaro_Wild_Ride,Games/Enthusia_Professional_Racing,Games/Ford_Vs_Chevy,Games/Forza_Horizon,Games/Forza_Horizon_2,Games/Forza_Horizon_3,Games/Forza_Horizon_4,Games/Forza_Horizon_5,Games/Forza_Motorsport,Games/Forza_Motorsport_2,Games/Forza_Motorsport_2023,Games/Forza_Motorsport_3,Games/Forza_Motorsport_4,Games/Forza_Motorsport_5,Games/Forza_Motorsport_6,Games/Gran_Turismo,Games/Gran_Turismo_2,Games/Gran_Turismo_2009,Games/Gran_Turismo_3_A_Spec,Games/Gran_Turismo_4,Games/Gran_Turismo_5,Games/Gran_Turismo_6,Games/Gran_Turismo_7,Games/GRID_Autosport,Games/Juiced,Games/Juiced_2_Hot_Import_Nights,Games/Juiced_Eliminator,Games/Midnight_Club_3_DUB_Edition,Games/Midnight_Club_Los_Angeles,Games/Midnight_Club_Los_Angeles_Remix,Games/Need_for_Speed_High_Stakes,Games/Project_CARS_3,Games/Real_Racing_3,Games/Street_Rod_2_The_Next_Generation | Locations=Locations/The_United_States_of_America | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Muscle_Car | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3601354-img_2180.jpeg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3601354-img_2180.jpeg","path":"137\/1377390\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_medium,square_tiny,scale_super,scale_small,square_avatar,square_small,scale_medium,scale_tiny,square_mini,screen_kubrick,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Chevrolet Camaro was the first pony muscle car the was manufactured in 1966 with an F-body to compete with the Ford Mustang.

{{Object | Name=Chevrolet Corvette | Guid=3055-7436 | Deck=Chevrolet Corvette, is a American grand touring muscle car that was born to become an American icon of sports cars, throughout the road. | Characters=Characters/Barbie,Characters/Sergeant_Cross | Concepts=Concepts/Chevrolet,Concepts/Licensed_Cars | Franchises= | Games=Games/Corvette,Games/Corvette_1994,Games/Corvette_Evolution_GT,Games/Corvette_ZR_1_Challenge,Games/Cruisn_Blast,Games/Cruisn_USA,Games/Ford_Vs_Chevy,Games/Forza_Horizon,Games/Forza_Horizon_2,Games/Forza_Horizon_3,Games/Forza_Horizon_4,Games/Forza_Horizon_5,Games/Forza_Motorsport,Games/Forza_Motorsport_2,Games/Forza_Motorsport_2023,Games/Forza_Motorsport_3,Games/Forza_Motorsport_4,Games/Forza_Motorsport_5,Games/Forza_Motorsport_6,Games/Forza_Motorsport_7,Games/Gran_Turismo,Games/Gran_Turismo_2,Games/Gran_Turismo_2009,Games/Gran_Turismo_3_A_Spec,Games/Gran_Turismo_4,Games/Gran_Turismo_5,Games/Gran_Turismo_6,Games/Gran_Turismo_7,Games/Juiced_Eliminator,Games/Midnight_Club_3_DUB_Edition,Games/Midnight_Club_Los_Angeles,Games/Midnight_Club_Los_Angeles_Remix,Games/Need_for_Speed_Carbon,Games/Need_for_Speed_High_Stakes,Games/Need_for_Speed_Hot_Pursuit_2,Games/Need_for_Speed_III_Hot_Pursuit,Games/Need_for_Speed_Most_Wanted,Games/Need_for_Speed_ProStreet,Games/Overdrive_City,Games/Road_And_Track_presents_The_Need_for_Speed,Games/Street_Rod,Games/Street_Rod_2_The_Next_Generation,Games/Top_Drives,Games/Vette | Locations=Locations/The_United_States_of_America | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Chevrolet_Corvette_C5,Objects/Chevrolet_Corvette_C5_Z06,Objects/Chevrolet_Corvette_ZR_1,Objects/Muscle_Car,Objects/Sports_Car | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/137/1377390/3601146-img_2146.jpeg }}

{{Object | Name=Chevrolet Corvette C6 | Guid=3055-7638 | Deck=The Chevrolet Corvette (C6) is the sixth generation of the Corvette sports car that was produced by Chevrolet division of General Motors for the 2005 to 2013 model years. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Chevrolet,Concepts/Licensed_Cars | Franchises= | Games=Games/Asphalt_Urban_GT,Games/Forza_Motorsport_2,Games/Forza_Motorsport_3,Games/Forza_Motorsport_4,Games/Forza_Motorsport_5,Games/Forza_Motorsport_7,Games/GRID,Games/GTR_Evolution,Games/Need_for_Speed_Most_Wanted,Games/RACE_Pro,Games/RaceRoom_Racing_Experience,Games/Real_Racing_3,Games/rFactor_2,Games/Shift_2_Unleashed,Games/The_Crew,Games/The_Crew_2,Games/The_Crew_Motorfest,Games/The_Fast_and_the_Furious,Games/Top_Drives | Locations=Locations/The_United_States_of_America | People= | Objects=Objects/Car,Objects/Sports_Car | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/151/1511438/3654797-2311766743-hq720.jpg }}

{{Object | Name=Chikipi Poultry | Guid=3055-7393 | Deck=A food item in Palworld. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Chikipi | Franchises= | Games=Games/Palworld | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Chikipi_Saute,Objects/Fried_Chikipi,Objects/Grilled_Chikipi | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/10/103881/3544934-chikipi_poultry.png }}
==Overview== Chikipi Poultry is a consumable food item in [[Games/Palworld|Palworld]]. It is dropped by Chikipi and can be eaten raw, cooked, or used as an ingredient in cooking other dishes. ==In-Game Description==
Chikipi meat. Light and easy to eat, it's a local favorite for residents of Palpagos Island.
==Stats== * Weight: 1 * Nutrition: 36 ==Cooking== Chikipi Poultry can be used as an ingredient to cook the following dishes: * [[Objects/Grilled_Chikipi|Grilled Chikipi]] * [[Objects/Chikipi_Saute|Chikipi Saute]] * [[Objects/Fried_Chikipi|Fried Chikipi]]

{{Object | Name=Chikipi Saute | Guid=3055-7395 | Deck=A food item from Palworld. | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Cooking | Franchises= | Games=Games/Palworld | Locations= | People= | Objects=Objects/Chikipi_Poultry | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/10/103881/3544939-chikipi_saute.png }}
==Overview== Chikipi Saute is a cooked consumable food item in [https://www.giantbomb.com/palworld/3030-82842 Palworld]. ==In-Game Description==
Plump poultry sautéed in butter. Accented with fresh lemons. Eat to slightly increase work speed for a period of time.
==Stats== * Weight: 0.5 * Nutrition: 92 * SAN: 12 ==Cooking== Chikipi Saute is created by cooking the following ingredients on a Cooking Pot: * 1 [[Objects/Chikipi_Poultry|Chikipi Poultry]] * 2 Red Berries

{{Object | Name=Chikuwa | Guid=3055-7309 | Deck=Chikuwa is a fried fish dish that is popular in Japan. | Characters=Characters/Takayuki_Yagami | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Lost_Judgment | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/Earth,Locations/Japan | People= | Objects=Objects/Fishcake,Objects/Rice,Objects/Tempura | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3511481-chikuwa_isobe-age_tempura.jpg }}

{{Object | Name=Clone Trooper Armor | Guid=3055-7410 | Deck=The (usually) white armor worn by the Clone Army. Frequently customized and modified, including with various color markings that were used to denote rank and/or the Clone's specific unit. | Characters=Characters/Boss,Characters/Captain_Rex,Characters/Commander_Bly,Characters/Commander_Cody,Characters/Commander_Fox,Characters/Commander_Stone,Characters/Echo_47031,Characters/Fives,Characters/Fixer,Characters/Hunter_47033,Characters/Obi_Wan_Kenobi,Characters/Scorch,Characters/Sev,Characters/Tech_47037,Characters/Wrecker_47036,Characters/X1,Characters/X2 | Concepts=Concepts/Anti_Trooper,Concepts/ARC_Trooper,Concepts/ARF_Trooper,Concepts/Clone_Assassin,Concepts/Clone_Blaze_Trooper,Concepts/Clone_Commander,Concepts/Clone_Jet_Trooper,Concepts/Clone_Pilot,Concepts/Clone_Sharpshooter,Concepts/Clone_Troopers,Concepts/Clone_Wars,Concepts/Galactic_Empire,Concepts/Galactic_Republic,Concepts/Great_Jedi_Purge,Concepts/Jedi,Concepts/Republic_Commando | Franchises= | Games=Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_II_The_Original_Trilogy,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_III_The_Clone_Wars,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_The_Complete_Saga,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_The_Skywalker_Saga,Games/LEGO_Star_Wars_The_Video_Game,Games/Star_Wars_Battlefront,Games/Star_Wars_Battlefront_Classic_Collection,Games/Star_Wars_Battlefront_Elite_Squadron,Games/Star_Wars_Battlefront_II,Games/Star_Wars_Episode_III_Revenge_of_the_Sith,Games/Star_Wars_Galactic_Battlegrounds,Games/Star_Wars_Galaxy_of_Heroes,Games/Star_Wars_Jedi_Fallen_Order,Games/Star_Wars_Republic_Commando,Games/Star_Wars_The_Clone_Wars,Games/Star_Wars_The_Clone_Wars_Republic_Heroes | Locations=Locations/Christophsis,Locations/Coruscant,Locations/Dantooine,Locations/Felucia,Locations/Geonosis,Locations/Kamino,Locations/Kashyyyk,Locations/Naboo,Locations/Star_Wars_Galaxy,Locations/Tatooine,Locations/Utapau | People= | Objects=Objects/Armor,Objects/Gloves,Objects/Helmet | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/77/776653/3562543-screenshot2024-03-27000300.png }}

Frequently customized and modified, including with various color markings that were used to denote rank and/or the Clone's specific unit.

{{Object | Name=Daibutsu | Guid=3055-7466 | Aliases=Buddharūpa,Buddha Statue,Butsuzō | Deck=Daibutsu ("Great Buddha" in Japanese) is the informal term for large statues of Buddhas, usually the Buddha of Buddhism, Siddhartha Gautama. | Characters=Characters/Adon,Characters/Dan_Hibiki,Characters/Sagat,Characters/Sengoku,Characters/Siddhartha_Gautama,Characters/Tong_Lee | | Locations=Locations/Bhutan,Locations/Burma,Locations/Cambodia,Locations/China,Locations/Hong_Kong,Locations/India,Locations/Japan,Locations/Laos,Locations/Macau,Locations/Malaysia,Locations/Mongolia,Locations/Nepal,Locations/Palace_Gates,Locations/Singapore,Locations/South_Korea,Locations/Sri_Lanka,Locations/Taiwan,Locations/Thailand | People= | Objects=Objects/Dogu,Objects/Statue | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/16/164924/3628327-1574859369-FU7CgO8WAA42O5u.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3628327-1574859369-FU7CgO8WAA42O5u.jpg","path":"16\/164924\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_avatar,square_small,scale_small,scale_medium,scale_super,square_medium,square_tiny,square_mini,scale_avatar,scale_large,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Daibutsu ("Great Buddha" in Japanese) is the informal term for large statues of Buddhas, usually the Buddha of Buddhism, Siddhartha Gautama.

{{Object | Name=Davy Crockett | Guid=3055-7750 | Deck=The Davy Crockett is a US Army built weapon that is known as the smallest nuclear weapon on the planet. | Characters=Characters/Colonel_Volgin,Characters/Cunningham,Characters/The_Boss | Concepts=Concepts/Nuclear_Fallout,Concepts/Nuclear_War,Concepts/United_States_Army | Franchises= | Games=Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_3_Snake_Eater,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_3_Subsistence,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_D_Snake_Eater,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_HD_Collection,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_Master_Collection_Vol_1,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_Portable_Ops,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_Snake_Eater_3D,Games/Metal_Gear_Solid_The_Legacy_Collection_1987_2012 | Locations=Locations/Asia,Locations/Earth,Locations/Europe,Locations/North_America,Locations/Puerto_Rico,Locations/San_Hieronymo_Peninsula,Locations/South_America,Locations/Soviet_Union,Locations/The_United_States_of_America,Locations/Tselinoyarsk | People= | Objects=Objects/Missile,Objects/Nuclear_Bomb | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3799372-1_lewis.png }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3799372-1_lewis.png","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_medium,square_small,square_avatar,scale_small,scale_super,square_mini,square_medium,square_tiny","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> The Davy Crockett is a US Army built weapon that is known as the smallest nuclear weapon on the planet.

{{Object | Name=De Lisle carbine | Guid=3055-7662 | Deck=British pistol-caliber carbine with an integrated silencer, used during and after World War II | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Korean_War,Concepts/War,Concepts/World_War_II | Franchises= | Games=Games/The_Operative_No_One_Lives_Forever | Locations=Locations/England | People= | Objects=Objects/Gun,Objects/Rifle,Objects/Silencer | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3686697-delisle.jpg }}

{{Object | Name=Death on the Pale Horse | Guid=3055-7722 | Deck=A painting by Benjamin West on the theme of the Biblical Apocalypse, painted in 3 versions in 1783, 1784 and 1817 | Characters= | Concepts=Concepts/Painter | Franchises= | Games=Games/Condemned_Criminal_Origins | Locations=Locations/Art_Museum,Locations/Library | People= | Objects=Objects/Paint,Objects/Paint_Brush,Objects/Paintings | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/173/1734046/3775783-7766986267-Death.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3775783-7766986267-Death.jpg","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,scale_medium,square_medium,scale_super,square_tiny,scale_tiny,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini","caption":"Benjamin West - Death on the Pale Horse (Third version)"},"background":[]}' /> A painting by Benjamin West on the theme of the Biblical Apocalypse, painted in 3 versions in 1783, 1784 and 1817

revision.comment: Point cover at a rendition that actually serves
revision.text:
{{Object | Name=Deep Fryer | Guid=3055-7354 | Deck=Deep Fryers are the instrument to which food is submerged in hot oil and cooked. | Characters=Characters/Bill_Dauterive,Characters/Boomhauer,Characters/Dale_Gribble,Characters/Hank_Hill,Characters/Plankton,Characters/SpongeBob_SquarePants,Characters/Squidward_Tentacles | Concepts= | Franchises= | Games=Games/Fortnite,Games/Kiosk,Games/Marvels_Spider_Man_2,Games/Teardown | Locations=Locations/McDonalds,Locations/Taco_Bell,Locations/Taco_Bell_Cantina,Locations/Wendys | People= | Objects=Objects/Basket,Objects/Candy,Objects/Cheese,Objects/Coconut_Oil,Objects/Doritos,Objects/French_Fries,Objects/Fried_Chicken,Objects/Funnel_Cake,Objects/Meat,Objects/Potato,Objects/Potato_Chips,Objects/Poutine,Objects/Tortilla_Chips,Objects/Tortillas,Objects/Utz_Potato_Chips,Objects/Vegetable_Oil | Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/scale_super/8/82962/3517332-81%2Brog35gfl.jpg }}
<div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3517332-81+rog35gfl.jpg","path":"8\/82962\/","mime":"image\/jpeg","sizes":"square_small,square_avatar,scale_medium,scale_small,square_mini,square_medium,square_tiny,scale_super,scale_large,scale_avatar,screen_kubrick,screen_medium","caption":null},"background":[]}' /> Deep Fryers are the instrument to which food is submerged in hot oil and cooked.

{{Object |Name=Dinosaur Skeleton |Guid=3055-7719 |Image=https://www.giantbomb.com/a/uploads/original/173/1734046/3771979-16899620-lara-croft-tomb-raider-curse-of-the-sword-game-boy-color-theres-.png |Deck=Found in museums, on excavations, or frozen in ice somewhere at snow level - for hilarity. Sometimes they can come back to life |Characters=Characters/Alan_Grant, Characters/Lara_Croft, Characters/Monster_G, Characters/Sir_Daniel_Fortesque |Concepts=Concepts/Archeology, Concepts/Caveman, Concepts/Digging, Concepts/Dinosaur, Concepts/Ice_Stage, Concepts/Skeletons, Concepts/Stone_Age, Concepts/Tyrannosaurus_Rex |Games=Games/6_Pak, Games/Aggressive_Inline, Games/Boulder_Dash_40th_Anniversary, Games/Condemned_2_Bloodshot, Games/Darksiders_III, Games/Fido_Dido, Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_IV, Games/Grand_Theft_Auto_IV_And_Episodes_from_Liberty_City_The_Complete_Edition, Games/inFamous_Second_Son, Games/Joe_And_Mac_Caveman_Ninja, Games/Joe_And_Mac_Ultimate_Caveman_Collection, Games/Jurassic_Park_1993, Games/Jurassic_Park_73443, Games/Jurassic_Park_Classic_Games_Collection, Games/Lara_Croft_Tomb_Raider_Curse_of_the_Sword, Games/MediEvil_II, Games/Night_at_the_Museum_Battle_of_the_Smithsonian, Games/Ninja_Gaiden_2004, Games/Ninja_Gaiden_Black, Games/Parasite_Eve, Games/Runaway_A_Road_Adventure, Games/Sega_Classics, Games/Sega_Genesis_Classics, Games/Sega_Vintage_Collection_Alex_Kidd_And_Co, Games/The_Revenge_of_Shinobi, Games/Time_Trax |Locations=Locations/Excavation_Site, Locations/Jurassic_Park, Locations/Museum, Locations/Underground |Objects=Objects/Bone, Objects/Fossil, Objects/Skeleton }} <div id='imageData' data-json='{"infobox":{"file":"3771979-16899620-lara-croft-tomb-raider-curse-of-the-sword-game-boy-color-theres-.png","path":"173\/1734046\/","mime":"image\/png","sizes":"scale_super,scale_medium,square_medium,square_small,scale_small,square_avatar,square_mini,square_tiny,scale_tiny,screen_medium,scale_large,screen_kubrick,scale_avatar","caption":"Lara Croft Tomb Raider: Curse of the Sword - Dinosaur Skeleton"},"background":[]}' /> Found in museums, on excavations, or frozen in ice somewhere at snow level - for hilarity. Sometimes they can come back to life
